title: US envoys in Doha to meet mediators but not Iranians, Qatar says
summary_full: Qatar's foreign ministry spokesman says no high-level meetings or direct talks between the US and Iran are scheduled.
summary_public: Qatar's foreign ministry spokesman says no high-level meetings or direct talks between the US and Iran are scheduled.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: no high-level meetings or direct talks between the US and Iran
